---
title: "Use-case B — homogeneous vs. heterogeneous parameter fitting"
subtitle: "4.2 Parameter exploration and model optimization"
jupyter: python3
---

## Goals

- TODO: fit a global parameter to a target observable (e.g. frequency gradient)
- TODO: fit region-wise heterogeneous parameters with TVB-Optim
- TODO: compare goodness of fit and interpretability

## Setup

```{python}
# TODO: imports, including tvboptim
```

## Define target and loss

```{python}
# TODO: load TVBase map, define loss against simulated observable
```

## Homogeneous fit

```{python}
# TODO: optimise a single global parameter
```

## Heterogeneous fit

```{python}
# TODO: optimise a per-region parameter vector
```

## Compare

```{python}
# TODO: residuals, parameter maps, runtime
```

## Exercises

- TODO: regularise the heterogeneous fit and discuss the trade-off
- TODO: try a different target map
